title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #13, Luffy, Shaka, York as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
